import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Return Running Software Version."}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/version"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint returns the version of Ory Kratos.

If the service supports TLS Edge Termination, this endpoint does not require the `X-Forwarded-Proto` header to be set.

Be aware that if you are running multiple nodes of this service, the version will never refer to the cluster state, only to a
single instance.

<ParamsDetails></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema {...require("./get-version.RequestSchema.json")}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes {...require("./get-version.StatusCodes.json")}></StatusCodes>
